code:
import io
import string
import list

fn insert_sorted(_ sorted: List<Int>, _ x: Int) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut inserted = false
  for v in sorted
    if not inserted and x < v
      result = list.push(result, x)
      inserted = true
    end
    result = list.push(result, v)
  end
  if not inserted
    result = list.push(result, x)
  end
  result
end

let text = io.read_to_end()
let tokens = string.split_whitespace(text)

mut nums: List<Int> = []
for tok in tokens
  match string.parse_int(tok)
  when Some(n)
    if not list.contains(nums, n)
      nums = list.push(nums, n)
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
end

mut sorted: List<Int> = []
for x in nums
  sorted = insert_sorted(sorted, x)
end

mut out = ""
mut first = true
for v in sorted
  if first
    out = "#{v}"
    first = false
  else
    out = "#{out} #{v}"
  end
end
println(out)
